title: sesamum calycinum subsp. calycinum
intro: Sesamum calycinum subsp. calycinum, also known as the hairy cotton plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pedaliaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sesamum calycinum subsp. calycinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and lower cholesterol levels. Sesamum calycinum subsp. calycinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
